descriptionTemplate: Karen gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: After Karen plays a card, restore [Heal:Arg2] HP and Gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. After playing {Marvelous Cuisine}, inflict [{Poison}:Arg4] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg4]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} on all enemies.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Karen gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: After Karen plays a card, recover [Heal:Arg2] HP and gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. At the end of the turn, if Karen's Command Card is {Retained}, the HP Recovery and Aliemus Generation trigger 2 times. After playing {Marvelous Cuisine}, inflict [{Poison}:Arg4] stacks of {Poison} on all enemies.
